<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band08_chunk006.pdf#page=16 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band08 p280 -->

<!-- header: WAIKERSAICH -->

<!-- header: WALKERSAICH -->


[[File:Band08_chunk006_p016_img001.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band08_chunk006_p016_img002.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band08_chunk006_p016_img003.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band08_chunk006_p016_img004.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band08_chunk006_p016_img005.jpg|thumb|Sonne unter Mond]]



[[File:Band08_chunk006_p016_img006.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band08_chunk006_p016_img007.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band08_chunk006_p016_img008.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band08_chunk006_p016_img009.jpg|thumb|h Sonne im Zodiaku]]



[[File:Band08_chunk006_p016_img010.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band08_chunk006_p016_img011.jpg|thumb]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band08 p281 -->
